title: Create: Easy Structures
description: A mod that adds some structures to Minecraft which have Create mod blocks included.
body:

# Create: Easy Structures

This mod aims to add new structures to Minecraft which have Create mod blocks included. The mod is in early alpha and may contain bugs or glitches.
If you find bugs or have suggestions, please join the official [M Productions Discord server](https://discord.gg/m-productions-1114679331923435620)!
